goal: Replace the active green checkmark favicon (app/icon.svg) and references in layout with the Orthren logo from app/favicon-svg.svg.

steps.action: Overwrite app/icon.svg with the SVG content of app/favicon-svg.svg
steps.success_criteria: app/icon.svg exists and its contents are identical to app/favicon-svg.svg

steps.action: Copy app/favicon-svg.svg to public/favicon-svg.svg so it is served statically as a public asset
steps.success_criteria: public/favicon-svg.svg exists and its contents match app/favicon-svg.svg

steps.action: Update app/layout.tsx to reference /favicon-svg.svg instead of /orthren-icon.svg
steps.success_criteria: app/layout.tsx metadata.icons.icon and head link tag refer to '/favicon-svg.svg'

constraints: Do not break Next.js layout metadata structure
Keep the new SVG contents identical to app/favicon-svg.svg
rollback: git checkout app/icon.svg app/layout.tsx && rm -f public/favicon-svg.svg
